title: Automated Error Log Generator
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Python function named 'log_errors()' that takes a string as input, parses it for specific error keywords, and outputs a formatted JSON object containing the error messages. The function should be under 100 lines of code, use descriptive variable names, and include a docstring.
constraints: Must be written in Python 3.x syntax
Must be under 200 characters in total

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid
The generated code should adhere to the specified constraints (Python 3.x syntax and under 200 characters total)
The generated code should be readable and follow best practices (descriptive variable names, docstring)
